20:44 â November 6, 2020
Updated User Management Content
We are continuing to update documentation to reflect the decommissioning of biometric devices and the streamlining of user management information. The documents updated this month are listed below. We will continue to update other content in phases.
Electronic Transactions Volume
PaymentStream
â¢ Direct Part
Section 2.1, Definitions
We added definitions for 2-step security, 2-step security token, and step-up authentication. We modified definitions for CPS Admin Security Officer and secure site.
Section 5.3, Granting
PaymentStream
Direct Access to a Secure Site User
We provided updated user management procedures.
Section 5.4, Granting
PaymentStream
Direct Access to an Existing CPS Admin Security Officer
We added clarity to the user management instructions.
Section 5.5, Granting
PaymentStream
Direct Access to a New CPS Admin Security Officer
We added clarity to the user management instructions.
We removed information on modifying and deleting Secure Site Users and CPS Admin Security Officers as this information is available in the CPS Admin Application Part and the User Management Part.
